zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Andreas Beyer於1681年12月出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲素德利 維音斯特拉斯格莫斯海姆時，他的父親Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer31歲，母親Anna Kunigunde27歲。他於1703年2月27日與Anna Apollonia Hedderich在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆結婚。他們至少是16個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1738年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞。他去世於1723年在德國賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Andreas Beyer于1681年12月出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲素德利 維音斯特拉斯格莫斯海姆时，他的父亲Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer31岁，母亲Anna Kunigunde27岁。他于1703年2月27日与Anna Apollonia Hedderich在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆结婚。他们至少是16个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1738年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞。他去世于1723年在德国賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
from an agent derivative of Middle High German bāgen ‘to quarrel, to pride oneself’, hence a nickname for a quarrelsome or boastful person.

variants.name: Beyers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Beijers, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Andreas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

variants.name: Andries
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1682: Pennsylvania, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Andreas Beyer was born in December 1681, in Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer, was 31 and his mother, Anna Kunigunde, was 27. He married Anna Apollonia Hedderich on 27 February 1703, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 16 sons and 6 daughters. He immigrated to Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America in 1738. He died in 1723, in Framersheim, Alzey, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 42.

et.Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvani: Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Ameerika Ühendriigid

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Andreas Beyer est né en décembre 1681, à Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anna Kunigunde, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anna Apollonia Hedderich le 27 février 1703, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 16 fils et 6 filles. Il a immigré au Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1738. Il est décédé en 1723, à Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Andreas Beyer im Dezember 1681 in Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer 31 und seine Mutter Anna Kunigunde 27. Er hat am 27. Februar 1703 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Anna Apollonia Hedderich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 16 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er ist 1738 nach Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb 1723 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Andreas Beyer è nato il nel dicembre 1681 nel Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Anna Kunigunde, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anna Apollonia Hedderich il 27 febbraio 1703, nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 16 figli e 6 figlie. Immigrato nel Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America nel 1738. Morì nel 1723, nel Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Andreas Beyerが1681年12月にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズスuドリチェ ウエインストラssゴンメルシェイムで生まれた時，父Bartholomäus Christoph Beyerは31歳，母Anna Kunigundeは27歳であった。1703年2月27日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムでAnna Apollonia Hedderichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも16人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1738年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアに移住した。彼は1723年にドイツヘセンアルズエイフラムルシェイムで42歳で死去した。

ko.Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvani: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 툴p호c켄 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Andreas Beyer(이)가 1681년 12월 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스u들리체 위스트라ss 고머셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Kunigunde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1703년 2월 27일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 Anna Apollonia Hedderich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1738년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1723년 독일 헤센 알즈이 프레이머셰임에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Lebanon, Pennsylvania, United States: Lebanon, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Andreas Beyer nasceu em dezembro de 1681, em Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anna Kunigunde, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Apollonia Hedderich em 27 de fevereiro de 1703, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 16 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America em 1738. Ele faleceu em 1723, em Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemanha, com 42 anos.

ru.Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvani: тульпэоккен тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Andreas Beyer родился декабрь 1681 г. в местности гоммиршим, сuдлич винстраss, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Kunigunde, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Apollonia Hedderich 27 февраля 1703 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 16 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1738 году. Он умер в 1723 г. в местности фрамиршим, алзи, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Andreas Beyer nació en diciembre de 1681, en Gommersheim, Südliche Weinstraße, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Bartholomäus Christoph Beyer, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anna Kunigunde, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Anna Apollonia Hedderich el 27 de febrero de 1703, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 16 hijos y 6 hijas. Inmigró a Philadelphia, Pensilvania, British Colonial America en 1738. Murió en 1723, en Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 42 años.
